I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze the two fixes:

### Fix 1 Analysis (Line 72 - `sd-cf-emptystate-emptystate-req-wrap`)
The `Title` component is used as a direct child of `EmptyState`. In PFv6, `EmptyState` has a `titleText` prop that replaces the need for a `<Title>` child. The Title's text content should be moved to the `titleText` prop on `EmptyState`, and the `headingLevel` prop should also move to `EmptyState`.

### Fix 2 Analysis (Line 71 - `sd-new-absorbing-prop-emptystate-titletext`)
This confirms the same migration: `EmptyState` now has a `titleText` prop. The `<Title>` content should be moved to `titleText`.

**Combined transformation:**
1. Move the `<Title>` children text to `titleText` prop on `<EmptyState>`
2. Move `headingLevel` from `<Title>` to `<EmptyState>`
3. Remove the `<Title>` component wrapper entirely
4. Remove `Title` from imports (it will no longer be used)
5. Keep `EmptyStateBody` (already imported and used)

Let me apply the changes:

arguments.after:
<EmptyState variant={EmptyStateVariant.xs} titleText={t('You do not have any storage maps without owner references.')} headingLevel="h4">
      <EmptyStateBody>
arguments.before:
<EmptyState variant={EmptyStateVariant.xs}>
      <Title headingLevel="h4" size="md">
        {t('You do not have any storage maps without owner references.')}
      </Title>
      <EmptyStateBody>

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 (Line 72 - `sd-cf-emptystate-emptystate-req-wrap`): **Applied**
- Removed the `<Title headingLevel="h4" size="md">` wrapper from inside `<EmptyState>`
- Moved the title text content to the `titleText` prop on `<EmptyState>`
- Moved `headingLevel="h4"` to the `<EmptyState>` component
- Removed `Title` from the `@patternfly/react-core` import statement (no longer referenced)

### Fix 2 (Line 71 - `sd-new-absorbing-prop-emptystate-titletext`): **Applied** (combined with Fix 1)
- The `<Title>` children content (`t('You do not have any storage maps without owner references.')`) was moved to the new `titleText` prop on `<EmptyState>`
- `<EmptyStateBody>` remains as a child of `<EmptyState>` (already correctly structured)
